html:
Exclusive to:

The Gnarwail Horn is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is dropped by killing a Gnarwail or attacking its horn when it pokes through the Boat. The Gnarwail Horn can also be found in Sunken Chest.

The Gnarwail Horn can be used to create two Waves in the Ocean to push items away, or to craft the Strident Trident.

Trivia

  • The Gnarwail Horn was introduced in the Hook, Line, and Inker update.
  • Playing the Gnarwail Horn can tend all the Farm Plants within 5 tiles radius. However, a Gnarwail Horn can only be used in the ocean.

Gallery

  • Gnarwail Horn Texture

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sừng Gnarwail là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó rơi ra khi giết Gnarwail hoặc tấn công vào sừng của nó khi nó chọc qua Thuyền. Sừng Gnarwail cũng có thể được tìm thấy trong Sunken Chest.

The '''Gnarwail Horn''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is dropped by killing a [[Gnarwail]] or attacking its horn when it pokes through the [[Boat]]. The Gnarwail Horn can also be found in [[Sunken Chest]].

The Gnarwail Horn can be used to create two [[Waves#Don't Starve Together|Waves]] in the [[Ocean]] to push items away, or to craft the [[Strident Trident]]. 
{{clear}}

== {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Gnarwail Horn
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Kelp Fronds
|count2 = 4
|item3 = Twigs
|count3 = 2 
|result = Strident Trident
}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Gnarwail Horn was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Hook, Line, and Inker|Hook, Line, and Inker]]'' update.
* Playing the Gnarwail Horn can tend all the [[Farm Plant]]s within 5 tiles radius. However, a Gnarwail Horn can only be used in the ocean.
